name: Jordan
oracleText:
Jordan enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {W} or {U}.
Whenever you gain life, scry 1.
flavorText: "This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased." — Matthew 3:17
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional. Classics theme art uses Karoly Marko's "The Baptism of Christ in the River Jordan" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: River of Baptism

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Karoly Marko, The Baptism of Christ in the River Jordan
classics.sourceNotes: This gives the Jordan card a direct sacred-river association in a classical composition.
